title: Sugar Delight!
description: Always wanted more baked goods? I've added new sweet foods, chocolate, cake and more!
body: Have you always wanted more baked goods? I've added new sweet foods, chocolate, cake, and more! By the way, there's a cool gingerbread on the mod's splash screen, I brought it. Sugar Delight or Sugar Delight complements the FarmersDelight mod by adding sweet foods, chocolate, gingerbread, etc. I'd like to point out that not all food is sweet, for example, dark chocolate, which gives drying, but increases maximum health for a while
